Meal Name: Thai Red Curry Chicken w Roasted Pumpkin
Ingredients String: Chicken Breast (100g) | Coconut Milk (35g) | Fresh Coriander (5g) | Palm sugar (2g) | Pumpkin (90g) | Red Thai Curry Paste (Base) (45g)
Short Description: Red Thai curry with seared chicken breast, roasted pumpkin, and fresh coriander.
Instructions: Roast pumpkin | Sear chicken | Simmer with red Thai curry paste and coconut milk | Finish with palm sugar and coriander.
